096cd1497127bb7370c8422997fe0902b30e28c9bb38f221","dweb:/ipfs/Qmb1mffW8KswbWcn8NUWg7EsnGx3rWVzKpeAf5eGf7jhmM"]}},"version":1}

borrow(uint256,bool,uint256).details: Executes a borrow operation by accepting lender offers

params.maxApr: Maximum APR acceptable for this borrow
params.useSeniorOnly: Whether to only use senior offers

claimFunds(uint256).details: Claims claimable funds from a settled position

params.positionId: ID of the position to claim from

closeMarket().details: Closes market if no outstanding debt

constructor.details: Constructor that disables initializers for implementation contract

depositCollateral(uint256).details: Deposits collateral into the escrow contract

endLiquidation().details: Ends liquidation process (called by factory after auction completes)

forceCloseMarket().details: Forces market closure when debt is below cleanup threshold

getActivePositionsPaginated(uint256,uint.details: Returns paginated list of active position IDs

getCurrentPrincipal().details: Returns current principal without interest, summed across all active positions

returns._0: Additional amount that can be borrowed

getPositionClaimable(uint256).details: Returns claimable amount for a position

getPositionValue(uint256).details: Returns current value of a position including accrued interest

getTotalOwed().details: Returns total outstanding debt including accrued interest, summed      across all active positions (each accruing at its own apr).      Bounded by MAX_ACTIVE_POSITIONS, same O(n) pattern already used by      _distributeRepayment/_distributeLoss.

returns._0: Total debt across all active positions

initialize(address,address,address,addre.details: Initializes the market contract (replaces constructor for upgradeable pattern)

params._borrowAsset: Address of the borrow asset token
params._borrower: Address authorized to borrow from this market
params._collateralAsset: Address of the collateral asset token

isHealthy().details: Checks if market is healthy (above liquidation threshold)

isLiquidatable().details: Checks if market is liquidatable (below threshold)

returns._0: True if market can be liquidated

liquidate().details: External function to trigger liquidation if market is liquidatable

repay(uint256).details: Repays a portion of the outstanding debt

params.amount: Amount to repay (will cap at total debt)

repayFull().details: Repays entire outstanding debt and settles all positions

setContracts(address,address,address,add.details: Sets external contract addresses after initialization

settleLiquidation(uint256,uint256).details: Settles liquidation after auction, distributing repaid debt and losses

params.debtRepaid: Amount of debt repaid from auction

startLiquidation().details: Starts liquidation process if market is liquidatable

totalAssets().details: Returns total assets held by this contract

withdrawCollateral(uint256).details: Withdraws collateral from escrow if sufficient health factor

forceCloseMarket().notice: Only callable by borrower when debt is minimal
